description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find solar panels between 350–450 W that cost at most $300 each, then add 2 units of the highest-rated option to your cart.
tasks.name: Find solar panels between 350–450 W that cost at most $300 each, then add 2 units of the highest-rated option to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Find a 5 kW grid-tie inverter with at least 97% efficiency priced at $1200 or less, and add the cheapest qualifying option to your cart.
tasks.name: Find a 5 kW grid-tie inverter with at least 97% efficiency priced at $1200 or less, and add the cheapest qualifying option to your cart.
tasks.description: Find a 5 kW grid-tie inverter with at least 97% efficiency priced at $1200 or less, and add the cheapest qualifying option to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Add to your cart one residential system bundle sized 4–6 kW priced between $4000–$5000, one compatible inverter priced $800–$1200, and one roof mount kit for 4–6 kW asphalt shingle systems under $500, keeping the cart total below $6000 (using a cheaper mount kit under $300 only if needed).

target_names: 4–6 kW Asphalt Shingle Roof Mount Kit

tasks.instruction: Submit a commercial rooftop solar quote request for a 50 kW system in ZIP code 94103 with a target installation timeframe in Q3 2025 and phone as the preferred contact method.

expected_values.comments: Requesting quote for a 50 kW rooftop system in 94103 by Q3 2025

tasks.instruction: Using the installer locator, search within 50 miles of ZIP code 30301 for providers that offer EV charging and open the details for the closest qualifying installer.

tasks.instruction: From the product catalog, open the technical datasheet PDF for a 400 W monocrystalline PERC solar panel designed for residential rooftop use.

target_names: SPX-400 Mono PERC Solar Panel Technical Datasheet

tasks.instruction: Filter generators to 10–15 kW models under $4000, compare the first two results sorted by power, choose the one with the lower noise rating, add one to your cart, then add a compatible parallel kit from its recommended accessories.

tasks.instruction: Complete the online warranty registration form for a residential rooftop inverter purchase, using a purchase date in January 2025, a price slightly above $2000, and including its model, serial number, and full owner contact details.

tasks.instruction: Find an article published in 2024 or later about 2025 solar tax credits for homeowners, then use the newsletter form on that page to subscribe with your email while selecting both the residential solar and policy update topics.
